name: Impress Holdings, Inc.
summary: Impress Holdings, Inc. engages in the provision of content business in Japan. The company publishes magazines, books, and e-books for various fields, such as IT, music, design, mountain nature, and mobile services; and provides net media and target media services, as well as SP/PR tools for companies and local governments and contract production of websites, etc. It also offers planning, development, and distribution functions for content businesses, including EC platforms, electronic comic platforms, and publishing and distribution platforms. The company was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
